D12 PsychologyL3 ApplyReference

Pop-Out Search — Pre-Attentive Single-Feature Detection

A unique-colour target among uniform distractors "pops out" instantly; reaction time is flat across set size — Treisman's classic Feature Integration Theory

Feature search (red among greens) is pre-attentive — parallel processing, O(1) RT. Conjunction search (red square among red circles and green squares) is serial — O(n) RT scaling with set size. Pop-out drives airport signage, dashboard warnings, and game-UI design.

Slide set size and toggle target presence to see RT model.
